query_normalized: predicting adsorption isotherm parameters from molecular features chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) as it empirically measures adsorption isotherms and analyzes them using thermodynamic models (BET-inspired) to derive parameters for specific molecular systems (5CB nematogens) in mesoporous silica, directly addressing the domain of predicting or characterizing adsorption behavior from molecular features.
